titlestmt.author: University Archives staff, 1990 April; finding aid revised by Katharine A. Lawrie, 2013 July; machine-readable finding aid created by Katharine A. Lawrie, 2013 July.

p.date: ©1990 April; finding aid last updated 2026 May.

address.addressline: Room A1713, Charles E. Young Research Library

publicationstmt.p: Finding aid description and metadata in this record are licensed under a Creative Commons Public Domain Designation (CC0 1.0 Universal). See LSC's Metadata Rights Statement for more information.

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-05-04 14:36:38 -0700.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: University of California, Los Angeles. School of Dentistry

physdesc.extent: (34 unprocessed optical discs, 4 unprocessed floppy disks)

did.abstract: Record Series 191 contains administrative records, photographs, and publications of UCLA's School of Dentistry.

accessrestrict.head: Access
accessrestrict.p: COLLECTION STORED OFF-SITE AT SRLF: Open for research. Advance notice required for access. Contact the UCLA Library Special Collections Reference Desk for paging information.

Portions of collection unprocessed. Material in the UA-2024-003 backlog series is unavailable for access. Please see LSC's Access to Unprocessed Collections Policy for more information about levels of discovery and access of special collections materials and registering interest in unprocessed collections.

phystech.head: Physical Characteristics and Technical Requirements
phystech.p: CONTAINS UNPROCESSED AUDIOVISUAL AND DIGITAL MATERIALS: Audiovisual and digital materials are not currently available for access and will require further processing and assessment. If you have questions about this material please email AskLSC@library.ucla.edu.

userestrict.head: Publication Rights
userestrict.p: Copyright of portions of this collection has been assigned to The Regents of the University of California. The UCLA University Archives can grant permission to publish for materials to which it holds the copyright. All requests for permission to publish or quote must be submitted in writing to the UCLA University Archivist.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Transferred by UCLA School of Dentistry, circa 1989 and 2024.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: [Identification of item], School of Dentistry records (University Archives Record Series 191). UCLA Library Special Collections, University Archives.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived user interest and research value, availability of staff and resources, and competing priorities. Library Special Collections provides a standard level of preservation and access for all collections and, when time and resources permit, conducts more intensive processing. These materials have been arranged and described according to national and local standards and best practices.

We are committed to providing ethical, inclusive, and anti-racist description of the materials we steward, and to remediating existing description of our materials that contains language that may be offensive or cause harm. We invite you to submit feedback about how our collections are described, and how they could be described more accurately, by filling out the form located on our website: Report Problematic Content and Description in UCLA's library collections and archives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Content
scopecontent.p: Record Series 191 contains administrative records and publications of UCLA's School of Dentistry. The collection includes annual reports, organizational magazines, peer-reviewed research papers, student yearbooks, financial reports, fundraising appeals, clinic marketing material, internal correspondence, photographs, negatives, and slides, and some digital media.

did.unittitle: UCLA School of Dentistry: The Planning Years.

physdesc.extent: (34 unprocessed optical discs, 4 unprocessed floppy disks)

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Unprocessed series. This material is unavailable for access. Please see LSC's Access to Unprocessed Collections Policy for more information about levels of discovery and access of special collections materials and registering interest in unprocessed collections.

phystech.head: Physical Characteristics and Technical Requirements
phystech.p: CONTAINS UNPROCESSED AUDIOVISUAL AND DIGITAL MATERIALS: Audiovisual and digital materials are not currently available for access and will require further processing and assessment. If you have questions about this material please email AskLSC@library.ucla.edu.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series includes publications (annual reports, organizational magazines, peer-reviewed research papers, student yearbooks, financial reports, fundraising appeals, clinic marketing material), internal correspondence, photos, negatives, and slides, and some digital media.
